message:
test(proptest): add property-based tests for viewport_reflow_planner (wa-1atbr)

New file: tests/proptest_viewport_reflow.rs (~30 properties)

Core planner invariants (1000 cases each):
  - Determinism: identical input → identical plan
  - Complete coverage: every line [0, total) in exactly one batch
  - Batch sizes bounded by max_batch_lines (clamped to 1)
  - All batch ranges non-empty and within buffer bounds

Priority ordering (1000 cases each):
  - First batch always ViewportCore (viewport-first guarantee)
  - ViewportCore precedes ColdScrollback in batch order
  - ViewportOverscan precedes ColdScrollback
  - Scheduler class mapping: viewport/overscan → Interactive, cold → Background
  - Every batch has non-empty rationale

Frame budget accounting (1000 cases each):
  - At least one batch always selected for visible progress
  - frame_work_units matches sum of selected batch work_units
  - Selected batches form contiguous prefix (no gaps)
  - Every batch has work_units >= 1
  - frame_budget_units clamped to >= 1

Degenerate inputs (500 cases each):
  - Zero total lines → empty plan
  - Zero viewport height → empty plan
  - Arbitrary input combinations never panic

Scheduling hooks and logs (500 cases each):
  - scheduling_hooks() count matches batch count
  - Hook fields match batch fields exactly
  - log_lines() count matches batch count
  - Every log line has required structured fields

Serde roundtrip (500 cases each):
  - ReflowPlannerInput, ReflowBatchPriority, ReflowLineRange, full ReflowPlan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
